TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kalatadrang, title = Kalatadrang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kalatadrang} }

S.FORM: alang Kalatadrang ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 69 buwan, 230 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 214 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 16 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Kalatadrang ga Tjulitjulik ru Viljauljaul. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kalatadrang ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kalatadrang ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 69 buwan, 230 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 214 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 16 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Kalatadrang ga Tjulitjulik ru Viljauljaul. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kalatadrang ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kalata*raŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na kalata*raŋ ɣa tjulitjulik ru *iljauljaul. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kalata*raŋ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
